firstlib.Diane 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Utilisation de df_velo et filtrage des boucles

    Filtre les anomalies non nulles

    filtre_anomalie.Rd

    Filtre les anomalies non nulles

    filtre_anomalie(trajet)

    Arguments

    trajet

    A data.frame

    Value

    A data.frame

    Examples

    data(df_small)
filtre_anomalie(df_small)
#> # A tibble: 41 × 32
#>    `Numéro de boucle` Jour        `00`  `01`  `02`  `03`  `04`  `05`  `06`  `07`
#>                 <dbl> <date>     <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
#>  1                746 2025-12-31     0     0     0     1     0     1     2     6
#>  2                787 2025-12-31     4     3     2     1     2     4     6    27
#>  3                943 2025-12-31     0     0     0     1     0     0     0     1
#>  4                947 2025-12-31     0     0     0     1     1     0     0     5
#>  5                948 2025-12-31     0     1     0     0     0     0     3     8
#>  6                977 2025-12-31     0     0     0     0     0     0     2     0
#>  7                677 2025-12-31     0     0     0     0     0     1     1    11
#>  8                667 2025-12-31     6     2     4     4     1     5    20    52
#>  9                676 2025-12-31     1     1     0     0     0     0     1     6
#> 10                674 2025-12-31    11     3     1     0     1     0     2     7
#> # ℹ 31 more rows
#> # ℹ 22 more variables: `08` <dbl>, `09` <dbl>, `10` <dbl>, `11` <dbl>,
#> #   `12` <dbl>, `13` <dbl>, `14` <dbl>, `15` <dbl>, `16` <dbl>, `17` <dbl>,
#> #   `18` <dbl>, `19` <dbl>, `20` <dbl>, `21` <dbl>, `22` <dbl>, `23` <dbl>,
#> #   Total <dbl>, `Probabilité de présence d'anomalies` <chr>,
#> #   `Jour de la semaine` <dbl>, `Boucle de comptage` <chr>,
#> #   `Date formatée` <date>, Vacances <chr>

    Contents
